description: Configure Wazuh to detect compromised credentials by implementing a CDB list at /var/ossec/etc/lists/compromised_users using the usernames provided in /home/ga/breached_users.txt (formatted as key:value). Create a detection rule with ID 100050 and level 12 that triggers when an SSH success event (rule 5715) matches a username in the compromised users list. Ensure the manager is configured to utilize the new list and the detection rule is active.
